name: Chocolate Chip Pecan Squares
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 15 Minutes Bake Time: 25 to 30 Minutes
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease an 8 x 8 x 2 inch pan with Butter Flavor Crisco. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the Butter Flavor Crisco and brown sugar with the Egg, Milk, and Vanilla using an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended. Reduce mixer speed to low. Add the flour, stirring in one cup of Milk Chocolate Chips and half a cup of chopped Pecans. Spread mixture evenly in the prepared pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and sprinkle with one cup of Milk Chocolate Chips. Allow to cool for about 5 minutes, or until chips are softened. Use a spatula to spread the chocolate evenly. Sprinkle with the remaining half a cup of chopped Pecans.
4. Cool completely before cutting into 2x2 inch squares.
Makes 16 squares.
